prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy card illustration for an original game called Blood Rogue showing an amazon huntress surviving a lethal volley through pure discipline and footwork, folding into a low defensive slip while arrows and spearpoints carve through the empty space she just vacated.
Subject: one centered athletic female huntress in worn leather armor with uncovered hair or a tight braid, low sidestep or crouched slip posture, no hood, no afterimage clones, no counterattack, no full battlefield.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art.
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, compact central figure, strong negative space around the body, dark uncluttered edges, readable at small card size.
Lighting/mood: alert, defensive, controlled, survivalist.
Color palette: ash gray, cold steel, worn leather brown, smoke ivory, soot black.
Materials/textures: leather straps, arrow shafts, iron tips, dust, wind-scoured cloth, faint impact grit.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no extra heroes, no modern objects.
Avoid: no hooded rogue, no spectral duplicate, no ghost magic, no weapon swing, no busy action scene.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy card illustration for an original game called Blood Rogue showing a hunter's decoy lure taking the full enemy volley in the party's place, like a false target planted with ruthless fieldcraft.
Subject: one centered ritual decoy or target effigy mounted on a spear-stake and dressed in torn amazon gear, arrows and thrown blades converging on it, the real hunter absent or only implied, no living full-body hero.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art.
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, one dominant central lure object, dark edges, simple dusty backdrop, very readable silhouette.
Lighting/mood: cunning, protective, deceptive, disciplined.
Color palette: pale bone ivory, ash gray, weathered leather brown, cold iron, ember dim gold.
Materials/textures: splintered wood, leather wraps, torn cloth, arrow trails, dust, faint false-target glow.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no extra characters, no modern objects.
Avoid: no hooded phantom person, no realistic human face, no crowded battlefield, no neon magic, no anime.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy card illustration for an original game called Blood Rogue showing a barbarian's battle instinct taking over at the exact killing moment, with one brutal primary strike landing while his stance, gaze, and surrounding debris make it clear he already senses every other threat in the melee.
Subject: one centered barbarian warrior with visible face or profile, bare arms or furred shoulders, massive axe or sword in a decisive strike, secondary enemy silhouettes or weapons thrown off balance at the perimeter, no robed figure, no full crowd.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art.
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, dominant torso-and-weapon composition, strong central impact, compact enemy hints near the edges, readable at thumbnail size.
Lighting/mood: ferocious, lucid, commanding, predatory.
Color palette: black iron, ash gray, dried blood red, old bronze, ember orange.
Materials/textures: scarred steel, fur, leather, dust burst, shattered grit, weapon sparks.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no modern objects.
Avoid: no wizard fire ring, no robed silhouette, no abstract ghost figure, no giant battle crowd, no neon magic.
